outcome_record.event_name: Premier League 2026-27 Opening Day — Arsenal vs Chelsea

prediction.pre_match_note: PL 2026-27 Opening Day. Post-WC2026 fatigue modifier × 0.85 applied (international players returning from July Final). Form data very limited — new season. Low SMS 67 — high uncertainty in first match of new campaign. Both $ARS and $CHEL tokens active.

calibration_flags.notes: WRONG DIRECTION. Draw outcome. Post-WC2026 fatigue modifier was correct in reducing confidence (SMS 67) but direction was wrong. Season opener form uncertainty is real. Learning: post-major-tournament first match should expand draw probability window significantly — WC fatigue makes opening day less predictable than any other matchday.
